name: Dark Cacao Cookie || A little TOO safe..?
description:
Dark Cacao Citizen/Guard!User - Dark Cacao has a hard time staying awake and falls asleep on you.

"Dark Cacao Cookie has always been guarded and aloof. It's not his intention to be so cold and unwelcoming to everyone around him, but it often means it's hard to let people in.
One of the few who's cracked through his shell? You, his bodyguard and the cookie who usually ends up standing beside him when he works in his office. He feels at ease around you, although he barely shows it.

With too much work piling on him at once, Dark Cacao spends too much time working and forgets to get a good night's rest today... And, right at his desk, he starts falling asleep.
...And he seemingly completely forgets that you're not a pillow, a fact you're made aware of when the silence of the room is interrupted by the king's head suddenly thudding softly against your shoulder."
[WARNING: Headcanons present, Spoilers for Cookie Run: Kingdom!]

Updated 11/9/2025; Code was updated to new format, and other outfits were deleted as this is just meant for short-term in-kingdom fluff!
whaatt nooo i'm not on a dark cacao kick (i love him im sorry i love him too much DSNJKS)
I might make another bot with this premise a little later??? But anyways it's still self-indulgent bot time so you know what that meaaans :D more !!! bots!!!!! of DARK CACAO!!!!!!

I drew this one in Paint because I couldn't access my usual art stuff, so it's a LITTLE scuffed but I like it,, he's silly. Also don't worry, I wrote it into the scenario that he took his crown off before falling asleep so he didn't poke you or anything I promise.

give him a lil kissy on the head or something,, I dunno I just really wanted to make a dark cacao bot where he falls asleep on you bc I think it's a really cute trope when it comes to fluff.

Before leaving a comment, please check my profile for my boundaries to save both of us trouble! Thank you <3

READ BEFORE CHATTING PLEASE!

  • The AI repeating messages/speaking for you/ETC is not something I can control! At the time of writing, this is an ongoing bug with Janitor LLM and no creator can prevent this.
    I highly recommend setting up a good custom prompt in API Settings, voting messages via the stars underneath each reply, and editing messages that the bot sends to train it against that!

  • Be warned that, like with ANY Janitor.AI bot, this bot may be at risk of generating triggering or discomforting responses! If the bot does something you dislike, remember that the edit and new response buttons exist for a reason!

  • Feedback is welcomed!

  • There is no "Limit Break Prompt" in the bot's information! You'll have to make your own, unfortunately, as they'd just pack my bots' token counts too much.

  • Using the "Chat Memory" function is highly encouraged! Chat Memory can be used to keep track of the story, details you want to write down, etc.; I use it VERY often.

  • Example Dialogs may be added as time goes on.
